title: (curios) Anti Lava
description: addon to Curios API hows add a lava core how protects you form lava
body:
This is an add-on for Curios API.

This addon adds the lava core, the lava core gives you the fire resistance effect. which helps you survive, especially in the nether. 

it can currently only be crafted.

the link to the mod:[curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
